pi_items.source: Setup script (setup_task.sh) and export script (export_result.sh) hardcode this target path.
Setup script (setup_task.sh) copies the JASP 'Exam Anxiety.csv' file to this location and sets it as the active dataset.
JASP analysis archives (.jasp) are zip files containing the original data (~2.2KB CSV for this dataset) plus JSON configurations. The output will be well over 1000 bytes.

privileged_info_summary: The task correctly uses the synthetic 'Exam Anxiety' dataset. Setup scripts copy the data to '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv', and validation specifically checks for a valid JASP archive (containing correct Bayesian ANCOVA JSON definitions) generated at '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/BayesianANCOVA_ExamAnxiety.jasp'. The output JASP file must exceed 1000 bytes.
